brief.audience: hotel operators and travel service providers
brief.coreMessage: AI voice agents enhance hotel concierge services and streamline travel booking

headlines: Telnyx Voice AI Cuts Concierge Response Time to Under 200ms
Streamline Travel Booking with Telnyx’s Single Platform Voice AI
Telnyx Owns Network Infrastructure in 140+ Countries for Voice AI
Reduce Latency and Complexity in Hotel Concierge Services with Telnyx
Telnyx Voice AI: One Platform, Zero Extra Hops, Full Compliance
Enhance Travel Service Efficiency Using Telnyx’s Sub-200ms Voice AI
Telnyx Voice AI Integrates Telephony and Inference on Owned Network
Simplify Hotel Concierge Operations Across 140+ Countries with Telnyx
Telnyx Voice AI Meets HIPAA, SOC2, PCI Standards for Travel Services
One Platform for Voice AI and Telephony in Global Travel Services
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI leverages its owned network and co-located inference to deliver sub-200ms latency voice interactions in over 140 countries.
Consolidate concierge and travel booking systems into one HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI compliant platform with zero extra network hops.
Telnyx’s infrastructure eliminates vendor complexity by providing voice AI services on a single owned network across 140+ countries.
Improve hotel operator efficiency by deploying AI voice agents on a platform with direct telephony integration and strict compliance standards.
Reduce travel booking friction with Telnyx Voice AI’s low-latency processing and globally distributed network infrastructure.
